description.ko: 보이지 않는 리듬이 푸른 파형 호를 주황색 순간 파열과 드문 위상 노드로 휘어 보이게 하는 미니멀한 방사형 사운드 흔적.
description.en: A minimal radial sound trace where invisible rhythm bends blue wave arcs into orange transient snaps and sparse phase nodes.

prompt: ECHO-0 sound visualization imagined as a silent polar diffraction trace hovering a few millimeters above a matte graphite field, viewed in a tight oblique macro composition. No speaker, performer, instrument, humanoid, core, sphere, corridor, membrane, glass pane, ice slab, tile grid, ribbon array, vellum map, abacus, or circuit chip appears; the artwork is only minimal line behavior responding to invisible sound. Hair-thin #4169E1 royal-blue soundwave arcs whip outward in broken radial sweeps, then kink into sharp #FF4500 orange snap accents where rapid transient beats cut across the pattern. Sparse #FFD700 gold phase points sit at rare arc intersections, while tiny #32CD32 lime timing bars interrupt the outer rim like syncopated pitch jumps. Keep the particle count low and the negative space dominant: crisp floating line shadows, clipped amplitude corners, offset echo ghosts, high contrast, fast rhythmic tempo, vibrating frequencies made visible as resonance in silence.
